title: Cave Rave Will Set a Sweaty Stage on the Path to Fantasia
author: unknown
date_note: Pre-event preview; published shortly before Fantasia 2014 (June 2014)
body:
Westword preview piece covering the Cave Rave event as a lead-up to Fantasia 2014. Cave Rave was also one of Colin's alphabets releases (CAVE RAVE, an alphabets album). This article connects the album/event name to the Fantasia series, suggesting Cave Rave served as both a themed release and a warm-up event on the Fantasia 2014 calendar.

## Sources
- [Westword](https://www.westword.com/music/cave-rave-sets-a-sweaty-stage-on-the-path-to-fantasia-8066434/)
